examples: Supporters of the constitution had to quieten fears that aristocrats plotted to steal the fruits of the revolution.
Watch less TV, and you’ll notice your mind begin to quieten.
Horn shavings, boiled in water, are said to quieten the liver and quell fevers.
Three engines would each drive three fans that are smaller and thus easier to quieten than current ones.
NASA, America's aerospace agency, showed how to quieten the boom by using a fatter wing on a modified fighter plane.
